title: Open Structure
text: Open Structure Select a structure (a component or global ProcScript) to be opened for the Debugger Browser window. The Open Structure form is accessible only via the open icon in the browser’s toolbar. By default, the Open Structure form presents retrieval fields for signatures for type Component , and performs an automatic retrieve. (The Automatic retrieve check box of the Debugger Preferences form is selected by default.) You can choose other structure types and enter retrieve profiles for the structures to retrieve. Buttons Use the following buttons: Display —choose whether icons or details are displayed in the Retrieval list box . Retrieve —retrieves all structures matching the profiles you have entered for the Structure name field, or Library field, or both. Clear —clears the entry fields. Type Select a structure type ( Component or Global ProcScript ). The value of the Look in field changes to correspond to your selection. Look in Select the location in which to look for a ProcScript module in the debugger. Subsystem/Library Name of subsytem or library (or retrieve profile) from which to choose a component or global ProcScript. For Type Component , enter the subsystem name or enter a profile for subsystems, from which to choose a component. For Type Global ProcScript , enter the library name or enter a profile for libraries, from which to choose a global ProcScript. Structure name Enter a structure name you want to open, or enter a profile for structures from which to choose. Retrieval list box A list of the retrieved structures, in icon representation, or with details, depending on your choice of button next to the Look in field. For a details list, to sort the list, click a column header. Debugger Browser information For more information about the Debugger Browser, refer to: Browsing ProcScript Modules in the Uniface Debugger . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
